channel.title: Jupyter on Susan Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Jupyter on Susan Chen

item.title: Project 6 : Tableau Dashboard of My Spotify Data
item.description: Project Overview This project started from a desire to uncover more pattens in my music streaming data that Spotify does not present in their annual Wrapped Up. Essentially I wanted to explore how my streaming times and the music that I listened to changed with events in my life and the pandemic. From pure observation of using Spotify between my laptop and phone, I did noticed that I mostly listened to songs that were released two-three years back during this past year.
